user.title: Setup TRMNL Entity Push
user.description: Provide your TRMNL plugin webhook URL. Afterwards you can tag your Home Assistant entities to send. [How to tag your entities can be found Here](https://github.com/Jef-NL/trmnl-sensor-push).

data_description.webhook_url: The webhook URL. The URL can be found on the plugin settings page.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the provided URL. Please verify the url is correct and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred while setting up the flow.
